title: tectaria pleiosora
intro: Tectaria pleiosora, also known as the Indian fan fern or Tectaria, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tectaria pleiosora include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and act as a natural remedy for fever and respiratory issues. Tectaria pleiosora can be prepared for herbal use through teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
